metadata.note: Profiles reviewed Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 for regime shifts. Based on fundamental analysis and historical correlation.

brent.description: Oil price, direct cost/revenue impact on sectors

usd_try.description: FX rate, export competitiveness & foreign debt impact

vix.description: Global risk appetite, affects EM inflows

cds.description: Turkey sovereign risk, FX stability sentiment

AKSEN.description: Oil & gas producer, direct commodity exposure

brent.mechanism: Revenue directly tied to oil price; margin improvement on price up

usd_try.mechanism: Minor FX exposure (international customers, but USD-denominated revenues hedge)

vix.mechanism: EM carry trade unwind (VIX up) → EM currency weakness → commodity price down correlation

cds.mechanism: Indirect (if sovereign stress, currency weak, but energy revenues USD-based)

TAVHL.description: International airline, fuel cost sensitive, FX sensitive

brent.mechanism: Jet fuel cost (35-40% of operating cost); fuel hedging partial, margin compression

usd_try.mechanism: Aircraft leasing in USD; TRY weakness increases capex/lease costs; revenues partially TRY

vix.mechanism: Travel demand drops in risk-off; EM tourism most hit

cds.mechanism: Higher sovereign risk → less tourist inflows; currency weakness affects leasing costs

TTKOM.description: Telecom operator, capex FX sensitive, domestic revenue TRY

brent.mechanism: No direct commodity exposure; energy cost minor

usd_try.mechanism: Network expansion capex in USD/EUR; TRY weakness inflates capex spend, margin compression

vix.mechanism: Dividend yield relative to volatility; risk-off → dividend appeal down, but dividend-oriented stock

cds.mechanism: Indirect FX impact; refinancing risk if CDS > 500 bps

KCHOL.description: Conglomerate holding, net long EM, FX sensitive, dividend yield

brent.mechanism: Portfolio exposure to energy subunits (AKSEN stake), risk-on commodities

usd_try.mechanism: FX mismatch (some assets USD revenue, equity financing TRY); net negative

vix.mechanism: EM carry sentiment positive when VIX low; VIX down = EM inflows = bullish

cds.mechanism: Refinancing access (if CDS high, borrowing cost up); portfolio company stress

ENERY.description: Power generation (hydro + thermal), revenue in TRY, fuel cost sensitivity

brent.mechanism: Thermal generation (coal/gas cost); not fully passed to customers; margin compression

usd_try.mechanism: Minor FX exposure; mostly domestic TRY revenue

cds.mechanism: Regulatory risk (price controls) if sovereign stress

ASELS.description: Consumer electronics retailer, domestic TRY revenue, FX sensitive imports

brent.mechanism: No direct energy exposure; logistics cost minor

usd_try.mechanism: Imports of electronics in USD; TRY weakness inflates COGS, margin compression

vix.mechanism: Consumer discretionary; risk-off → spending drops sharply

cds.mechanism: Consumer credit tightens; purchasing power down as TRY weakens

TOASO.description: Petrochemical producer, raw material cost + FX sensitive

brent.mechanism: Raw materials (naphtha, crude) cost up with oil price; margin compression if not passed

usd_try.mechanism: Input costs in USD (oil), sales partially TRY; net negative on TRY weakness

vix.mechanism: Chemical demand (auto, packaging) drops in risk-off

cds.mechanism: Refinancing costs up; FX cost on dollar debt

THYAO.description: Flag carrier airline, international routes, fuel cost + FX sensitive

brent.mechanism: Jet fuel (40% of operating cost); limited hedging; margin compression

usd_try.mechanism: Aircraft leasing in USD; revenues in mix of USD/TRY; net negative on TRY weakness

vix.mechanism: International travel demand most sensitive to EM risk-off

cds.mechanism: Sovereign stress → tourist decline; refinancing cost on USD debt

HALKB.description: Commercial bank, TRY liabilities/assets, FX fee income positive, credit risk

usd_try.mechanism: FX fee income up on volatility; TRY weakness → forex trading profit; NPL risk on TRY borrowers

vix.mechanism: Risk-off → credit tightening, lower lending volume; dividend yield attractive in risk-off

cds.mechanism: Sovereign stress → bank stress; deposit flight risk; capital controls risk

GARAN.description: Large commercial bank, similar to HALKB + some FX exposure

usd_try.mechanism: FX fee income on volatility; but NPL risk on TRY borrowers in import sectors

vix.mechanism: Credit cycle; dividend yield attractive, but volume down in risk-off

cds.mechanism: Sovereign stress → banking crisis risk; deposit confidence shaken

AKENR.description: Energy producer, direct commodity exposure similar to AKSEN

brent.mechanism: Revenue directly tied to oil price; margin improvement on price up

usd_try.mechanism: Minor FX exposure (international customers, but USD-denominated revenues hedge)

vix.mechanism: EM carry trade unwind (VIX up) → EM currency weakness → commodity price down correlation

cds.mechanism: Indirect (if sovereign stress, currency weak, but energy revenues USD-based)

ZOREN.description: Energy producer, direct commodity exposure similar to AKSEN

brent.mechanism: Revenue directly tied to oil price; margin improvement on price up

usd_try.mechanism: Minor FX exposure (international customers, but USD-denominated revenues hedge)

vix.mechanism: EM carry trade unwind (VIX up) → EM currency weakness → commodity price down correlation

cds.mechanism: Indirect (if sovereign stress, currency weak, but energy revenues USD-based)
